abilities: I'll keep you on your feet.
My turn to protect you. (healing Anran )
Hope you brought a change of clothes!
The tide is with you! Dive in! (target)
chatter: You know what they say. Just go with the flow.
Wish I remembered Shifu's battle advice about now. *sigh* Shouldn't have slept through his classes.
Let's show 'em what we're made of!
Just one more win, huh? Piece of cake.
Only one more win, right? This'll be easy.
Don't worry, guys. We can still turn this around.
Hey, no long faces! We've got this.
Last round! Let's take home the win!
Now or never! Uh... anyone else feeling the pressure...?
We got this, right? *exhales* I know we got this!
As Anran would say, I still have a ways to go.
I meant to do that! ...Okay, maybe I didn't.
Well, no one learns without making mistakes, right?
Whoops! Got a little ahead of myself there.
*sigh* Older siblings, am I right? (eliminated by Anran )
Ow... did she have to hit that hard? (eliminated by Anran )
Guess it's just me right now.
Ooh, it's... really a one-man show right now, huh?
And they said Fire isn't right for me!
Now that's what I'm talking about.
*sigh* You gotta teach me your tricks.
Enemy's back. I think they want some more!
call-outs: I'm so ready. Come at me!
Come on, no need to hide!
Come get a piece of me!
Come on, guys! Just hold out a little more!
They're almost out of time. Just hang in there!
We just have to hold them off a little longer!
If we don't move now, we're dead in the water!
Time's running out. Let's move it!
We're running out of time! Let's get going!
eliminations: Come on, is that really all you've got?
Guess my training's paying off.
Hey, it's just a little water!
Nice!
Oh-ho! Easy.
*wince* They'll walk it off.
Come on, sis. Don't drop the ball! (eliminating Anran )
Don't let your guard down, sis. (eliminating Anran )
Just paying respect to my "elders"! (eliminating Anran )
You can lead a horse to water, but... you know... (eliminating Ashe or Cassidy )
Ah, you've got nothing on my sister. (eliminating Ashe or Mauga )
See? Money doesn't buy happiness! (eliminating Domina )
But we had so much in common! (eliminating Genji )
See? I'm taking this seriously! (eliminating Hanzo )
Aw, your paws get wet? (eliminating Jetpack Cat )
No need to be so nervous! (eliminating Juno )
Heh, someone's not in balance with herself. (eliminating Kiriko )
Aw, I overwatered my flowers! (eliminating Lifeweaver )
Oh, how the turn tides. (eliminating another Wuyang )
Feels good winning a hard spar. (on low HP)
No way! Did anyone see that?! (unknown)
They say stillness overcomes movement. (eliminating enemy using movement ability)
Quick! Someone chant the ring-tightening mantra! (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
Didn't even break a sweat.
Let's keep it going!
That's what I'm talking about!
What can I say? I'm basically an expert.
Whoa, check me out!
Yeah! I am killing it!
Oh! Yeah, I'll accept compliments for that.
Haha, that's right! I'm the boss.
You just witnessed my most famous party trick!
Haha! Get washed!
Oh, we crushed them!
Eh, water under the bridge.
Ha! That's what you get for messing with me!
Practice makes perfect!
Revenge is sweet.
*sigh* Close one.
I've got your back.
Whoa, careful there!
Back off!
Ever heard of a personal bubble?
Belly flop!
Careful, that edge is slippery when wet.
Not sure about that diving form.
Oof... that looked like it hurt.
Watch where you're going!
Wouldn't wanna be ya!
Enemy turret busted.
Enemy turret down!
I'll stay out of your way.
Nice one!
Ooh... Wouldn't wanna be them!
Yeah! Get 'em!
That's my sis! (to Anran )
THAT'S MY SISTER! (to Anran , rare)
interactions: Wuyang : Hey, sis. Don't get in my way out there. Anran : Are you ever gonna let that go? Wuyang : Maybe... if you do my laundry for the rest of the year? Anran : Not happening.
Wuyang : Even after everything, I still made it to the front lines. Think I made mom and dad happy? Anran : Are they ever happy? Wuyang : Ah... good point.

Anran : I wasn't expecting to be thrown into the thick of it so soon after joining Overwatch . Wuyang : Yeah... I was hoping we'd have a... little more down-time. Anran : Well, we'll get through it. Taking breaks is overrated, anyway. Wuyang : *sigh* To you , maybe...

Wuyang : You gotta be more careful out there. Anran : What, and make your job easier? Hah, never. Wuyang : Ugh, for real? You've sprained your knee, like, a thousand times! Shifu would say to cherish your body. Anran : You're such a worrywart. I can handle it.

Wuyang : Thanks for convincing mom and dad to let me take a break from school . It probably wasn't easy. Anran : Eh, wasn't that bad. I told them you'd do a Masters when you got back. Wuyang : Grea-- oh, what?

Baptiste : Hey, I saw you in Winston's reports on the Chengdu attack. Way to stick it to Null Sector! Wuyang : Aw, it was nothing. My sister did most of the heavy lifting — I just got people out safe. Baptiste : Protecting our friends is a noble thing. Be proud of what you do! Wuyang : Thanks, man. It's nice to hear the reminder.
Reinhardt : A cat? In a jetpack?! *laugh* You’ve got to be catting me! *laugh* Jetpack Cat : *confused meows* Wuyang : Shouldn't it be “‘kitten’ me”? Brigitte : Ugh... trust me. I've already tried.
Wuyang : I hope I'm keeping up okay. You guys really are the best of the best. Cassidy : Kid, I was halfway to the jailhouse when they picked me up. I'd say you're doin' just fine.

Wuyang : Hey, you're that famous Mecha Guardian player, right? Could you train me? D.Va : What rank are you? Top 1000? Wuyang : I've been stuck in... *clears throat* Chrome, for a while, but I think I'm really close to ranking up! D.Va : Right... I'll ask Dae-hyun if he has time.

Wuyang : Whoa, that is a big fist. You look straight out of a fighting game! Doomfist : Every fight is a game. I have never lost. Wuyang : Huh... I get the feeling you aren't playing around in arcades.

Wuyang : I hear your job gets pretty real sometimes, but, um... You've never... you know. Freja : I'm not in the business of killing. Well... not often. Wuyang : O-kay...! I'll... try to keep my face off wanted posters.
Wuyang : Ugh. My sister gave me an earful yesterday. Wish she would cut me some slack sometimes. Genji : Cherish those moments... You'll miss them when they're gone.

Hanzo : *sigh* You act like my brother did in his youth. Wuyang : Really? So was he handsome? Charming? Funny? Hanzo : He wasted his time fooling around instead of learning responsibility. Wuyang : Oh. Uh, you... act like my sister .

Illari : Hey. Why do you cover your eyes when I channel solar energy? Wuyang : Everyone knows it's not safe to look at the sun without sunglasses. Illari : Um... it is not safe to look at the sun at all. Wuyang : Oh. Pfft, I knew that! I was just testing you.
Wuyang : Aww, hey, little guy! C'mere! Psst-psst-psst-psst-psst. Jetpack Cat : *hiss* Wuyang : Ack! Uh... sorry...

Juno : I have heard of Wuxing University ! My Auntie Xiao was a graduate. Wuyang : Wait... Xiao? As in, Dr. Tian Xiao of the Metal College? Juno : Yes! You have heard of her? Wuyang : My friend studied her old prototypes to build my staff! Ah, small world. Or, uh... *chuckle* Small solar system.

Juno : Wuyang? Will you... teach me to swim? Wuyang : Will you be okay? I thought you were scared of water. Juno : I am. But I must become braver if I do not wish to fall behind the others. Wuyang : Aw, don't stress. At least to me, you're braver than you think.

Wuyang : Ever trained your chi? I'm looking for more practice buddies! Kiriko : If you teach me tai chi, I'll teach you aikido. Wuyang : Uh, oh, wait. You're not just looking for an excuse to... flip me, are you? Kiriko : *laughs* Busted!

Kiriko : I only ever hear horror stories about siblings. Ever wish you were an only child? Anran : Honestly? I wouldn't give up my brother for the world. (variant if Wuyang is present, replaces response above) Anran : Literally every day of my life. Wuyang : Wha-- hey!
Lúcio : So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: What is your favorite animal? Wuyang : You ever see a stick bug? I think they're pretty neat. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it.

Lúcio: Hey, me and Brigitte are throwing a welcome party for you new agents! Any tune requests? Wuyang: As long as it's got lyrics, I'm happy. Instrumental stuff puts me in study mode. Lúcio: Ha! We wouldn't want that.

Wuyang : Too bad nobody here fights with steam. We'd have a whole cycle water locked down! Mei : *sigh* A little heat could get us there. Ooh! What about your sister? Wuyang : *sigh* She does get my blood boiling. So, I guess she fits the bill.

Wuyang : Dr. Ziegler, you should join us next time we run drills! I feel like I only ever see you in the lab. Mercy : I'm better at working than training. Why not ask Commander Chase ? Wuyang : Well... I was hoping to pick up some of your tricks with the staff. Mercy : If you promise to be patient with me, I'll do my best.
Mizuki: *sigh* The spirits are breathing down my neck again... gotta find a waterfall to stand under. Wuyang: Uh, I could make a really big wave? Mizuki: *frustrated huff* It's not the same.
Reaper: So, Overwatch is hiring interns now. How adorable. Wuyang: I know, right? I actually applied just before you ran away from Talon .

Wuyang : Man... you sure you guys invited the right person to Overwatch ? Sojourn : I'm sure. Winston was very insistent. Wuyang : I think I know my answer, but... I need sometime to let it sink in. Sojourn : I get it. It's not a decision to make lightly.

Soldier: 76 : Those mechs from your university were a real powerhouse during the crisis . I expect you'll live up to that standard. Wuyang : I'll do my best, sir! But, uh... I'm not a mech, so... maybe lower your bar a little? *nervous chuckle*
Sombra: Peeked at your grades. Pretty good for someone studying through a Null Sector attack. Wuyang: Thanks! Honestly, I'm pretty proud of-- oh, HEY! That's private! Sombra: Not to me.

Wuyang : Oh, oh! Winston! Why does water never laugh at jokes? Winston : Because it doesn't like dry humor? Wuyang : Aw, hey! You stole my punchline... Winston : No, I didn't. You just let it "slip" away!
map-specific: Maybe one day, I'll be a MEKA pilot. Just need to climb a few dozen ranks first.
So the Earth is 70% water, huh? *sigh* My parents would ask where the other 30% went.
I made that look easy, right?
It's easier when the ball's made of water.
Shifu keeps saying I should visit Mount Emei , but this is close enough, right?
